decision: Where does the strong teacher-forced token prior fail in deployment? Separate generated-prefix exposure from recursive predictor drift, learned-score error from oracle-outcome geometry, and flat prior execution from hierarchical planning, without symbolic feasibility filtering or an auxiliary LM.

jobs.purpose: Compare re-encoded and predictor-rolled generated prefixes under prior-only, predicted geometry, learned value, and an explicitly privileged oracle-outcome ceiling.
Measure pure state-conditioned prior execution with one-token receding re-encoding and no hierarchical intervention.
Measure whether support-constrained, reachability-refined hierarchy improves or damages the same prior using 256 macro candidates and 10 CEM updates.
